                                                        "runs": [
                                                            {
                                                                "text": "redefining how clients and servers send and receive data right in sttp 1.0 each"
                                                            }
                                                        ]
                                                    },
                                                    "startTimeText": {
                                                        "simpleText": "5:52"
                                                    },
                                                    "trackingParams": "CK0FENP2Bxg8IhMI8PujvuCDkwMVJ5CsAh3MhQD4",
                                                    "accessibility": {
                                                        "accessibilityData": {
                                                            "label": "5 minutes, 52 seconds redefining how clients and servers send and receive data right in sttp 1.0 each"
                                                        }

                                                }

                                                "transcriptSegmentRenderer": {
                                                    "startMs": "358919",
                                                    "endMs": "365840",
                                                    "snippet": {
                                                        "runs": [
                                                            {
                                                                "text": "request opened a new connection this led to inefficiencies since a connection had to be established and closed for every"
                                                            }
                                                        ]
                                                    },
                                                    "startTimeText": {
                                                        "simpleText": "5:58"
                                                    },
                                                    "trackingParams": "CKwFENP2Bxg9IhMI8PujvuCDkwMVJ5CsAh3MhQD4",
                                                    "accessibility": {
                                                        "accessibilityData": {
                                                            "label": "5 minutes, 58 seconds request opened a new connection this led to inefficiencies since a connection had to be established and closed for every"
                                                        }
                                                    },

                                                }
                                            },

                                                    "startMs": "365840",
                                                    "endMs": "371400",
                                                    "snippet": {
                                                        "runs": [
                                                            {
                                                                "text": "request and response which slowed performance in HTTP 1.1 they introduced"
                                                            }
                                                        ]
                                                    },
                                                    "startTimeText": {
                                                        "simpleText": "6:05"
                                                    },
                                                    "trackingParams": "CKsFENP2Bxg-IhMI8PujvuCDkwMVJ5CsAh3MhQD4",
                                                    "accessibility": {
                                                        "accessibilityData": {
                                                            "label": "6 minutes, 5 seconds request and response which slowed performance in HTTP 1.1 they introduced"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "targetId": "a3C1DMswClQ.CgNhc3ISAmVuGgA%3D.365840.371400"
                                                }
                                            },

                                                    "endMs": "377319",
                                                    "snippet": {
                                                        "runs": [
                                                            {
                                                                "text": "something called as persistent connections allowing multiple request and responses over the same connection"
                                                            }
                                                        ]
                                                    },
                                                    "startTimeText": {
                                                        "simpleText": "6:11"
                                                    },
                                                    "trackingParams": "CKoFENP2Bxg_IhMI8PujvuCDkwMVJ5CsAh3MhQD4",
                                                    "accessibility": {
                                                        "accessibilityData": {

                                                        }

                                                    "endMs": "383919",
                                                    "snippet": {
                                                        "runs": [
                                                            {
                                                                "text": "over the same TCP connection that was established before sending the request which significantly improved performance"
